reason: The best previous result (ID 1) used weighted_bce, specaugment, 5e-4, adamw, and cosine_decay. This new experiment retains the highly successful augmentation (specaugment), learning rate (5e-4), optimizer (adamw), and schedule (cosine_decay), while systematically testing if the standard focal loss (focal_g2.0) can improve upon the performance achieved with weighted_bce.
